payload.answer: Sam recently left Goldman and joined Point72; he still likes Bill Evans but has been listening more to early Coltrane lately; he and Daniele want to catch up about AI infra, and Sam asked Daniele to send an article.
payload.decision: Store a few current, high-signal facts about Sam’s job change, music preference, and a follow-up topic, while preserving the recent/temporary phrasing around the new job and the music shift.

entity_resolution.reason: The transcript does not provide enough information to link Sam or Daniele to an existing persistent entity with confidence.

payload.intent: Compile durable personal memory from a short conversation update.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, but lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam and Daniele want to catch up about AI infrastructure, and Sam asked Daniele to send an article.

details: Captured music preference with nuance and recency.
Captured follow-up topic and article request.

repair_options: If later transcripts contradict Sam’s employer, replace the employment fact with the most recent explicit update.
If later music preferences are more specific, refine the music preference card rather than deleting it unless clearly superseded.
